product_updates.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
product_updates.content: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

product_updates.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
product_updates.content: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

product_updates.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
product_updates.content: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience powered and standalone Siri app.

product_updates.title: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
product_updates.content: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.

product_updates.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
product_updates.content: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

product_updates.title: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
product_updates.content: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

product_updates.title: Visa invests in Replit to power agentic payments for developers
product_updates.content: Visa said that over 1,000 employees has been using Replit for prototyping and development

product_updates.title: 2 days left: Lock in ticket savings of up to $410 to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
product_updates.content: Savings of up to $410 on TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 tickets end tomorrow, May 29, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now to save and join 10,000+ tech leaders on October 13-15 in San Francisco.

product_updates.title: Has the hunt for AI compute uncovered the next Cerebras?
product_updates.content: General Compute is betting SambaNova will be the next breakout chipmaker.

product_updates.title: Vertu wants CEOs to run companies from an AI foldable starting at $6,880
product_updates.content: Built on top of the open source Hermes project, Vertu's new foldable combines AI-agent workflows, enterprise integrations, and ultra-premium luxury finishes.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: climate tech goes public and the AI Hype Index returns
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: Climate tech companies are going public. What’s next?
technical_breakthroughs.content: This year, there’s been a wave of notable energy companies going public via IPO in the US. The solar and battery company Solv Energy went public in February, to the tune of $6 billion. X-energy, which is building small modular nuclear reactors, did the same in April, and its stocks surged on its …

technical_breakthroughs.title: The AI Hype Index: AI gets booed in graduation season
technical_breakthroughs.content: It is one thing to say AI will change the world. It is another to expect the class of 2026 to applaud it. In fact, when former Google CEO Eric Schmidt told University of Arizona graduates that their task is to help shape AI, he was met with a resounding chorus of boos. “I can…
